productDisplayName: Puma Men Fox Mid Brown Sports Shoe
description: Brown and orange complement each other perfectly in this leather running shoe from puma. Extra grips on the sole make this an excellent choice when the terrain is rough or muddy. Choose this shoe for its high performance and for the popping orange colour laces and highlights on the sole. Upper Leather upper for durability and structure Lace-ups for a snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name stitched on the tongue Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole for absolute grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
